name: formal-methods-book
description: 仕様記述・模型検査・定理証明を統合的に学ぶ技術書

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run lint-structure && npm run check-links
scripts.lint-structure: npm run check:metadata && npm run test:bilingual-integrity && npm run check:search-index && npm run check:repository-hygiene && npm run check:tool-blocks && npm run check:tool-inventory && npm run check:example-manifest && npm run check:example-runner && npm run check:tool-cli && npm run check:matrix-plan && npm run check:example-workflow && npm run check:tla-semantics && npm run check:guarantees && node scripts/check-manuscript-guardrails.js docs && npm run qa:bilingual
scripts.check-links: markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/ja/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/ja/glossary/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/ja/chapters/*.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/ja/appendices/appendix-*.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/ja/introduction/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/ja/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/en/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/en/glossary/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/en/chapters/*.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/en/appendices/appendix-*.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/en/introduction/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p src/en/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p docs/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p docs/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p docs/en/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p docs/en/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -c .markdown-link-check.json -q -p docs/_includes/generated/*.md
scripts.check:metadata: npm run test:metadata-renderer && npm run test:publication-build && npm run test:provenance && node scripts/check-publish-metadata.js
scripts.check:tool-cli: node scripts/test-tool-cli-arguments.js && node scripts/test-prism-results.js && node scripts/test-tamarin-results.js && node scripts/test-sby-results.js && node scripts/test-cvc5-proof-results.js && bash scripts/test-safe-extract-archive.sh
scripts.check:matrix-plan: node scripts/plan-formal-matrix.js --self-test && node scripts/plan-formal-matrix.js --event schedule --lane nightly --tool all

author: 太田和彦（株式会社アイティードゥ）
